Variables.Name: MaxCurveError
Variables.Description: Max error for compression of curves using remove redundant keys

Variables.Name: AlternativeCompressionThreshold
Variables.Description:
The alternate error threshold (0.0 means don't try anything other than the current  default scheme) 
	 
	 Determines the current setting for world-space error tolerance in the animation compressor.
	 When requested, animation being compressed will also consider an alternative compression
	 method if the end result of that method produces less error than the AlternativeCompressionThreshold.
	 Also known as "Max End Effector Error"

Variables.Name: bForceBelowThreshold
Variables.Description: If true and the existing compression error is greater than Alternative Compression Threshold, then any compression technique (even one that increases the size) with a lower error will be used until it falls below the threshold

Variables.Name: bFirstRecompressUsingCurrentOrDefault
Variables.Description:
If true, then the animation will be first recompressed with it's current compressor if non-NULL, or with the global default compressor (specified in the engine ini) 
	 Also known as "Run Current Default Compressor"

Variables.Name: bRaiseMaxErrorToExisting
Variables.Description: If true and the existing compression error is greater than Alternative Compression Threshold, then Alternative Compression Threshold will be effectively raised to the existing error level

Variables.Name: bTryFixedBitwiseCompression
Variables.Description: If true, the uniform bitwise techniques will be tried

Variables.Name: bTryPerTrackBitwiseCompression
Variables.Description: If true, the per-track compressor techniques will be tried

Variables.Name: bTryLinearKeyRemovalCompression
Variables.Description: If true, the linear key removal techniques will be tried

Variables.Name: bTryIntervalKeyRemoval
Variables.Description: If true, the resampling techniques will be tried

Variables.Name: bStripAnimationDataOnDedicatedServer
Variables.Description: If true, animation track data will be stripped from dedicated server cooked data
